hero.name: Xue Aaron
hero.title: Game Developer & Creative Technologist
hero.headline: Game developer crafting emotional and interactive experiences across indie and commercial titles.
hero.valueProp: From founding an indie studio to collaborating with partners like Google and Devsisters, I design and build games that connect emotion, creativity, and technology.
hero.availability: Open to new collaborations and creative game projects (remote-friendly).

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm Xue Aaron — but most people in the dev scene know me as Casual Attitude. My journey began at the NTUT Programming Club, where I led operations and partnered with Google to host a machine learning course. That experience sparked my love for creating experiences that mix technology and creativity.
about.journey: Over the past six years, I've worked across the entire game development cycle — from concept and planning to code and release. I founded an independent studio and launched Soul of Butterflies – Incubation, handling story design, puzzle systems, and crowdfunding to commercial release.
about.current: After that, I joined Buho Interactive, contributing to a U.S. emotional-learning game project and later leading development on real-time action titles. Today, I'm managing outsourcing projects with Devsisters, creators of the CookieRun franchise.
about.passion: My technical toolkit spans Unity, Flutter, and web technologies (Vue + TypeScript), but what drives me most is crafting interactive worlds that evoke emotion and building teams that make those worlds real.
